title: King Stubb & Kasiva announces annual promotions: Four lawyers made Partner
description: King Stubb & Kasiva has announced Annual Promotions, which includes four new Partners and elevation of 28 other lawyers across positions.The following lawyers have been designated Partners:Vidya K.Simran TandonGauri JagtapSurbhi KapoorAlongside the Partner promotions, the Firm has also elevated 28 other key members across various levels including Associate Partners, Managing Associates, Principal Associates, and Senior Associates.Among those promoted to Associate Partner are Vijay Shankar, P
